channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Carney Prioritizes Diversifying Canada’s Foreign Relations Amid Shifting Global Landscape
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney's foreign policy approach has become increasingly pragmatic and transactional, focusing primarily on economic growth and reducing dependence on the United States. This appro...

item.description: The opposition parties have raised serious concerns over the recent decision of the Indian government to grant a waiver on Russian oil imports. They have questioned whether such decisions are being ta...

item.title: Western Cape re-enlists 62 experienced detectives to strengthen investigative capacity
item.description: Facing rising crime levels and stretched resources, the Western Cape has taken a proactive step by re-enlisting 62 former senior detectives who had previously retired or resigned from the South Africa...

item.title: Four men arrested in the UK over suspected links to Iranian intelligence
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have arrested four men in connection with a counter-terrorism investigation involving Iran. The individuals, one Iranian national and three dual British-Iranian nationals, are ...

item.title: Uttar Pradesh reports strong growth in credit and industrial investment
item.description: Uttar Pradesh is undergoing a remarkable financial transformation, marked by a substantial rise in credit distribution, industrial investment, and banking access. The state’s Credit-Deposit (CD) ratio...

item.title: Christian Craighead Demonstrates Bravery and Precision During Nairobi Attack
item.description: Christian Craighead, a British SAS operative known as Obi-Wan Nairobi, gained international recognition for his brave actions during the 2019 terrorist attack at Nairobi's DusitD2 hotel. While trainin...

item.title: Former Green Bay Packers President and CEO Bob Harlan Passes Away at 89
item.description: Bob Harlan, who led the Green Bay Packers as president and CEO from 1989 to 2008, has died at the age of 89 following a brief illness. The team announced his passing on March 5, 2026, after his family...

item.description: The conflict between the United States and Iran has intensified as both sides escalate military actions in the Middle East. The US administration has warned of a potential dramatic surge in operations...

item.title: Four men arrested in London over suspected spying on Jewish community for Iran
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have arrested four men on suspicion of spying on the Jewish community in London on behalf of Iran. The arrests occurred shortly after 1am in Barnet, Watford, and Harrow and inv...

item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) has initiated formal steps to repatriate Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs) currently based in the Middle East, amid ongoing regional tensions. This move aims to ...

item.title: Lily Allen References David Harbour and Breakup Themes During West End Girl Tour Performance
item.description: During her West End Girl tour stop at Glasgow Royal Concert Hall on March 2, 2026, British singer Lily Allen made a striking visual statement tied to the themes of her 2024 album. On stage, she wore a...
